narrative:
Franklin County has 890,087 registered voters, with 59.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.3%, a clear Democratic lean of 11.9 percentage points. Millennials are the largest generational cohort at 32.9% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +10.9% D−R vs +8.3% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
